field_changes.previous: The precise stake split and dates among the three are disputed — see CON-02.
field_changes.current: The stake split was disputed between two mirror passes (CON-02) — resolved 2026-07-18 from the preserved ARES VR record for IČO 02474727.

field_changes.previous: Radek Juhaňák and Jakub Kaman are both shareholders of Able.cz s.r.o. and co-own one label s.r.o. (IČO 02474727, Znojmo); a third person, Ondřej Kaman, also holds a stake and statutory role there.
field_changes.current: Radek Juhaňák and Jakub Kaman are both shareholders of Able.cz s.r.o. and co-own one label s.r.o. (IČO 02474727, Znojmo) together with Ondřej Kaman. Per the primary register: Jakub Kaman 36 % (jednatel since 2 Jan 2014; sole founder, 100 % until 2017), Ondřej Kaman 34 % (jednatel since 23 Feb 2022; 49 % during 2017–2022), Radek Juhaňák 30 % (jednatel since 23 Feb 2022).

observed_at_basis: retrievedAt nejstaršího citovaného zdroje (horní odhad — samotné pozorování mohlo být dřívější)
